title: Nome Outfitters Joins Bonanza Subsidiary
summary: Nome Outfitters has joined the Bonanza Fuel, LLC Subsidiary with the store re-opening scheduled for Monday, December 23, 2019, at 10 am AKDT. Bonanza Fuel, LLC CEO Scot Henderson shared, “We have worked strategically to grow our Nome-based retail operations for better serving both the Nome and Bering Strait regional markets. The acquisition of Nome Outfitters adds an important line of new products conveniently available at ou...
